name: Fanny Wertz
description:
The Blade Dancer!

from Mobile Legends: Bang Bang

Yeah yeah the magic of ODM gear without the gear and whatnot. God bless her skin designers (can we get different hairdos like Lunox srsly)

Mid bot, no lorebook used, god help me

Scenario 1 : You're a LOD native and Fanny takes cover from the summer heat on your house

Scenario 2 : You're a bandit with your gang under pursuit by Fanny

Scenario 3 : CYOS
creator: MW2npc
